race.comment: TAK GOES BOOM (6) is inching closer to another victory, finishing 1.4L off the winner last time out. Back up to 1920m today and he's a winner at this track and trip previously. Should be handy in the run and can get back to winning ways. ANOTHER NEPHEW (2) will find this a little easier than what he's been racing in. He's placed at this track and trip previously and he gets the blinkers back on today from a good draw. Wouldn't surprise to see sharp improvement from him. SNIP'S ROCK (9) will be fitter for his last start over 1500m here where he was off a freshen. Tsang remains in the saddle and the strep up to a more suitable distance is a big key for him. Expecting a better run today. ASARKA (12) was better here last time out beaten 1.2L. Can be in the finish again. MAXIMUM IMPACT (8) can improve stepping back out to this distance today.
